metadata.title: ORIS & ASH — Rare Fragrances
metadata.description: Rare fragrances, sourced and authenticated. For the ones who don't wear what everyone else does.

provenance.label: Provenance
provenance.heading: Each piece traced to its source, examined for authenticity, and selected for character.
provenance.step_01_body: We work with private collectors, retired boutiques, and verified estate sales across Europe and the Gulf.
provenance.step_02_body: Every bottle is examined by in-house specialists. Provenance documented. Concentration verified by GC-MS sampling.
provenance.step_03_body: Pieces are selected for character and rarity, never trend. We list what we'd wear ourselves.

collection.label: Selected Pieces — Collection 01
collection.heading: From private archives and verified houses.
collection.payment_disabled: Payment is disabled in this demo.
